news-global-econ.title: China’s biggest IPO in recent years has global investors getting creative
news-global-econ.description: Unable to buy directly into ChangXin Memory Technologies Inc’s planned $9.8 billion listing because of various regulatory restrictions on participation in mainland IPOs, investors are finding backdoors

news-global-econ.title: Microsoft gives salespeople tips to knock down Anthropic, OpenAI
news-global-econ.description: The world’s largest software company is pitching itself as a platform for corporations to fine-tune, deploy and monitor AI in their businesses

news-global-econ.title: India steps up import substitution as geopolitical tensions expose supply chain risks
news-global-econ.description: The Modi government is preparing an import substitution plan covering 100+ products to boost domestic manufacturing and reduce dependence on China

news-global-econ.title: AI frenzy fills Asian airlines’ cargo bays with semiconductors
news-global-econ.description: Asian airlines are the latest beneficiaries of growing demand for AI servers and computer chips, creating a windfall that’s helping mitigate the surge in jet fuel costs.

news-global-econ.title: Vance warns there will be a 'socialist president in this country' if GOP doesn't fix economy for young people
news-global-econ.description: Vice President JD Vance warned on Joe Rogan's podcast that 40 years of offshoring businesses, outsourcing jobs and low-wage immigration have driven young Americans toward socialism.

news-global-soc.title: India hikes diesel, ATF export taxes amid renewed US-Iran tensions
news-global-soc.description: India has raised export taxes on diesel and jet fuel while cutting the gasoline levy as renewed US-Iran tensions tighten global fuel markets.  35-word social media lead text options

news-global-soc.title: Maher skewers wealthy celebs who preached 'we're all in it together' during COVID as Americans struggled
news-global-soc.description: "Club Random" host Bill Maher called liberal celebrities "posers" for claiming "we're all in it together" while they stayed at home and had the other half of America deliver their food.
